user_goal: 按 MVP PRD 在 Global ETF Momentum 与 B009 数据 snapshot 基础上实现 Risk Parity / Volatility Target 回测 MVP：新增最小 risk parity 配置、收益率/波动率估计、逆波动率权重、无杠杆 exposure scaling、月度 T-day/T+1 回测 workflow、报告与安全回归，同时保持 fixture/mock-first CI、snapshot/data-quality semantics 和 no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI safety guards。
generator_handoff: Planner opened B010-risk-parity-backtest-mvp after B009 signoff. User agreed to continue MVP PRD route: implement the second core strategy research path, Risk Parity / Volatility Target, before portfolio allocation or paper/broker work. Scope: F001 minimal risk parity config boundary; F002 daily returns and annualized volatility estimation; F003 inverse volatility weights with no-leverage exposure scaling capped at 1.0 and defensive/cash allocation; F004 monthly T-day close signal / T+1 execution backtest workflow; F005 JSON/Markdown reports with metrics, weight history, costs, baseline comparison, snapshot/data quality references, and research limitations; F006 safety/workflow regression; F007 Codex evaluation. Preserve fixture/mock-first CI, explicit snapshot loading only, fail-closed missing snapshot behavior, no generated market data commits, and no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI-trading guards. Do not implement ERC/min-var optimizers, broker adapters, paper/live trading, frontend dashboard, AI execution, tax, cloud deployment, or investment advice.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-13: B009 was done with signoff after two fix rounds. Backlog/user reports/proposed-learnings were empty.
